chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. STRA 1522 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.3787/2023 3. For hearing of main case 26.11.2025 Mr. Muhammad Faheem Bhayo, advocate for respondent On the last date i.e. 19.11.2025, following order was passed: “None present for the applicant, Commissioner Inland Revenue, Zone-III, Karachi, despite fixed date having been given. As an indulgence, to come up on 26.11.2025” Today once again the applicant, Commissioner Inland Revenue, Zone-III, Karachi remains unrepresented without intimation or justification despite fixed date having been given. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with the matter. In view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
